record.field: common_values = {'name': 'Ex. ' + record.x_name, 'description': record.x_description, 'amount_type': 'code', 'price_include_override': 'tax_included', 'include_base_amount': True, 'formula': 'quantity * product.x_excise_amount', 'tax_group_id': env.ref('excise_management.excises_tax_group').id} sale_tax, purchase_tax = env['account.tax'].create([common_values | {'type_tax_use': 'sale'}, common_values | {'type_tax_use': 'purchase'}]) record.write({'x_sales_tax_id': sale_tax.id, 'x_purchase_tax_id': purchase_tax.id}) env.ref('excise_management.no_excise_tax_sale')['original_tax_ids'] = [Command.link(sale_tax.id)] env.ref('excise_management.no_excise_tax_purchase')['original_tax_ids'] = [Command.link(purchase_tax.id)] env['account.fiscal.position'].search([('x_is_fiscal_deposit', '=', False)])['tax_ids'] = [Command.link(sale_tax.id), Command.link(purchase_tax.id)]
Add/Remove excise tax on Fiscal Position

last_report_date = env['x_excise_report'].search([], order='x_to_date desc', limit=1).x_to_date from_date = last_report_date if last_report_date else datetime.date.today() - datetime.timedelta(days=7) if from_date < datetime.date.today(): res_id = env['x_excise_report'].create({'x_from_date': from_date, 'x_to_date': datetime.date.today(), 'x_reporter_id': env.company.x_reporter_id.id or env.ref('base.user_admin').id}) env['mail.activity'].create({'activity_type_id': env.ref('mail.mail_activity_data_todo').id, 'summary': f"Excise Report {res_id.x_name}",'res_model_id': env.ref('excise_management.excise_report').id, 'res_id': res_id.id, 'user_id': res_id.x_reporter_id.id, 'date_deadline': datetime.date.today() + datetime.timedelta(weeks=1)})

all_moves_ids = env['stock.move'].search([ ('date', '>=', min(records.mapped('x_from_date'), default=datetime.datetime.today())), ('date', '<', max(records.mapped('x_to_date'), default=datetime.datetime.today())), ('x_excise_category', '!=', False), ('x_fiscal_deposit_move', 'not in', ['none', False]), ('state', '=', 'done'), ]) for record in records: grouped_data = {} for move in all_moves_ids: if move.date.date() < record.x_from_date or move.date.date() >= record.x_to_date: continue key = (move.x_excise_category.id, move.x_fiscal_deposit_move) if key not in grouped_data: grouped_data[key] = {'qty': 0.0, 'amount': 0.0, 'line_move_ids': []} grouped_data[key]['qty'] += move.x_excise_quantity grouped_data[key]['amount'] += move.x_excise_amount grouped_data[key]['line_move_ids'].append(move.id) lines = env['x_excise_report_line'].create([{ 'x_excise_category_id': key[0], 'x_excise_move_type': key[1], 'x_excise_quantity': values['qty'], 'x_excise_amount': values['amount'], 'x_excise_report_id': record.id, 'x_move_ids': [(6, 0, values['line_move_ids'])] } for key, values in grouped_data.items()]) record['x_line_ids'] = [(6, 0, lines.ids)] if bool(lines) else [(5, 0, 0)]
Action to Create Excise Report Line
